no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: This bead is too large to execute as a single bounded pass and cannot be decomposed further because the execution tree is already at the split-depth cap. The contract spans multiple unrelated subsystems: execute-loop pre-close coordination, reviewer transport/retry plumbing, review classification taxonomy, repair-cycle scheduling, and a large new test matrix across cli/internal/agent/*. The requested ACs also exceed the one-bead scope by requiring both implementation and a full suite of new/updated tests. A follow-up should split this into smaller beads before implementation.
